creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
I suspect this was related to the issues referred to in entries on 20141127 in /usr/ports/UPDATING. It works for me in my jails.

Can you make sure your tree is up-to-date, and follow the instructions in 20141127 if necessary, and let me know if you still encounter this problem?

I'm really hoping that it's no longer an issue.
